violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Inside 4 door prep cooler needs cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Shelving and racks in walk in cooler need cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors and walls need more thorough cleaning.
Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. -Wet mop sitting in dirty water not in use.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean the shelving for clean dish storage.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean shelving in walk in cooler. -Clean lower shelving in pizza prep area. -Clean storage racks for pizza boxes and racks for pizza sauce storage. -Clean pizza dough racks in walk in cooler. -Clean handles and fronts of hot hold boxes.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Clean floors in walk in cooler.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
